title: Backend Developer Vacancy at VMware India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at VMware India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
VMware India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VMware India:
VMware India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
